---
# REQUIRED FIELDS
title: 'Standardised reporting of burden of disease studies: the STROBOD statement'
acronym: STROBOD
description: Reporting of burden of disease (BOD) studies.
doi: ''
pmid-id: '[39375690](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/39375690/)'
pmid-url: https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/39375690/
relevant-urls: ''
full-bibliographic-reference: 'Devleesschauwer B, Charalampous P, Gorasso V, Assunção
  R, Hilderink H, Idavain J, Lesnik T, Santric-Milicevic M, Pallari E, Pires SM, Plass
  D, Wyper GMA, Von der Lippe E, Haagsma JA. Standardised reporting of burden of disease
  studies: the STROBOD statement. Popul Health Metr. 2024;22(1):28.'


# OPTIONAL FIELDS
rg-language: English
explanation-and-elaboration-papers: ''
guideline-history: ''
relevant-more: ''
website-url: ''
additional-languages: ''
additional-information: ''
relevant-editorials: ''
primary-guideline: ''
other: ''
other-relevant-research: ''


# LIST FIELDS
study-design:
# - Animal pre-clinical research
# - Artificial intelligence/Machine learning studies
# - Clinical practice guidelines
# - Clinical trials
# - Diagnostic and prognostic studies
# - Economic evaluations
# - Experimental studies
# - Letters to the editor/Correspondence
# - Mixed methods studies
- Observational studies
# - Other
# - Patent landscapes
# - Qualitative research
# - Quality improvement studies
# - Reliability and agreement studies
# - Study protocols
# - Systematic reviews/Meta-analyses/Reviews/HTA/Overviews
# - No study design specified
clinical-specialty:
# - Allergy
# - Anaesthesia
# - Audiovestibular medicine
# - Behavioural medicine
# - Cardiovascular medicine
# - Complementary and alternative medicine
# - Dentistry
# - Dermatology
# - Emergency medicine
# - Gastroenterology
# - Genetics
# - Haematology
# - Health informatics
# - Hepatology
# - Infectious diseases
# - Medical education
# - Neurology
# - Nuclear medicine
# - Nutrition and dietetics
# - Obstetrics and gynaecology
# - Occupational therapy
# - Oncology
# - Ophthalmology
# - Paediatrics
# - Palliative care
# - Pathology
# - Pharmaceutical medicine
# - Physiotherapy
# - Primary care
# - Psychiatry
# - Psychology
- Public health
# - Radiology
# - Rehabilitation medicine
# - Renal medicine
# - Respiratory medicine
# - Rheumatology
# - Sport and exercise medicine
# - Surgery
# - Toxicology
# - Tropical medicine
# - Urology
# - No clinical specialty specified
report-section:
# - Abstract
# - Acknowledgements
# - Appendix
# - Biospecimen/bioresource information
# - Conference paper/abstract
# - Conflict of interest
# - Data
# - Ethical issues (consent etc.)
# - Figures/Graphs
# - Funding
# - Harms/adverse effects/safety data
# - Images
# - Intervention (exposure)
# - Narrative sections (discussion etc.)
# - Outcomes (variables)
# - Procedure/Method
# - Protocol-whole report
# - Research recommendations
# - Results
# - Statistical analysis plan-whole report
# - Statistical methods and analyses
# - Study characteristics (participants etc.)
# - Terminology/definitions
# - Title
- Whole report
# - No report section specified
keyword:
- BOD
- burden of disease
- checklist
- checklists
- DALY
- disability
- Disability-Adjusted Life Year
- Disability-Adjusted Life Years
- epidemiological
- epidemiology
- life expectancy
- life years
- observation
- observational
- population
- population health
- public
- public health
- STROBOD
- STROBOD checklist
- STROBOD Statement
- Years Lost due to Disability
- Years of Life Lost
- YLD
- YLL

---

{{< include ../_template.qmd >}}
